description: Fix coordinator edge cases and MCP server input validation
steps: In src/augur/registry.py DecisionCoordinator.get_consensus(): Clamp the final consensus total_score to [0, 10] (after meta-model blending and all weighting, total_score could drift outside bounds)

In src/augur/registry.py: The Kelly criterion block has `edge = max(0, (score - 5) / 5)` which is fine, but ensure pct is clamped: `pct = max(0.0, min(20.0, ...))` to handle NaN or negative edge cases

In src/augur/registry.py get_consensus(): When `total_weight` is 0 (all agents returned SignalType.ERROR with coverage_confidence=0), the division `total_score /= total_weight` would be ZeroDivisionError. Add a guard: if total_weight == 0, return neutral early
In src/augur/mcp_server.py augur_analyze(): Add ticker validation (same regex pattern as dashboard: r'^[A-Za-z0-9.\-]{1,15}$') and return a clear error string if invalid
In src/augur/mcp_server.py augur_consensus(): Add the same ticker validation
In src/augur/mcp_server.py augur_debate(): Add ticker validation and clamp rounds to [1, 5] to prevent resource abuse
In src/augur/mcp_server.py augur_create_persona(): Validate yaml_content is not empty and not excessively large (>10KB), return error string if invalid
acceptance_criteria: No ZeroDivisionError in get_consensus when all agents error out
MCP tools return clear error strings for invalid tickers (not exceptions/crashes)
verification: python -c "from augur.registry import DecisionCoordinator, AgentRegistry; from augur.personas.base import MarketContext, AgentResponse, SignalType; r=AgentRegistry(); c=DecisionCoordinator(r); empty={}; result=c.get_consensus(empty); print('Empty OK:', result.score); err_results={'a': AgentResponse(agent_id='a', agent_name='A', signal=SignalType.ERROR, confidence=0, score=0, reasoning='err', coverage_confidence=0.0)}; result2=c.get_consensus(err_results); print('Error OK:', result2.score)"
findings: All changes implemented and verified. registry.py: added else clause for total_weight==0 (keeps score/confidence at 0), added final score clamping max(0,min(10,score)) before return, Kelly neutral case already had max(0.0,...) guard. mcp_server.py: added re import and ticker validation regex to augur_analyze, augur_consensus, augur_debate; added rounds clamping max(1,min(5,rounds)) to augur_debate; added empty/size validation to augur_create_persona. All 86 tests pass.
